contribution.description: H3 reframed as multi-level compression. Identified that artist concerns about ownership and compensation get rerouted into a cluster labeled "AI as Creative Collaborator" (387 probes) while three orphan rights clusters (Copyright Protection, Defense Tools, Authorship Debates, 313 chunks total) contain zero artist probes. Threat dimension shows binary structure mapping to AI-good vs AI-bad. Voice collapse: opposite positions group by register in C7. Updated H3 section in both manuscripts, Figure 4 caption, summary bullets, supplementary info with within-theme cluster distribution analysis. Created handoff document for next session.

context.conversation_snippet: User: "ok - i will want you to unpack what happened with threat even more because that goes right with what this work and other work has found about public discourse" -> deep dive into within-theme cluster distribution -> reframed H3 around 4 compression mechanisms
